name: Pizza with Shrimp
recipeIngredient: Ready to bake pizza crust 1 each
Shrimp, shrimp shells removed and tails removed 10 medium
Red bell pepper, seeds removed and cut into thin strips 1 each
Olives, black or green 1 t Olive oil
recipeInstructions:
Steam broccoli for 5 minutes. Immediately place in ice water to halt cooking and retain color.
Brush pizza shell with olive oil. Squeeze cherry tomatoes and spread on top with mozzarella cheese.
Arrange shrimp, broccoli, peppers, sundried tomatoes, and olives on the pizza.
Bake at 450 degrees Fahrenheit for 10 minutes.
